events.title: Hangar Talk & Flight: Curtiss P-40 Warhawk
events.description: Monthly hangar talk featuring a live P-40 Warhawk demonstration flight with narrated ground presentation by museum volunteers.

events.title: Spring Family Fly-In at Brackett Field
events.description: Open ramp day for pilots and families. Aircraft displays, free Young Eagles flights for kids, and food trucks on the flight line.

events.title: March Field After Dark: Cold War Night
events.description: Special evening tour of Cold War aircraft under the stars. Docents stationed at B-52, SR-71, and U-2 exhibits. Tickets required.

events.title: Flabob Breakfast Fly-In
events.description: Classic Saturday morning breakfast fly-in at historic Flabob Airport. Pancake breakfast, vintage aircraft, and a relaxed vintage airfield atmosphere.

events.title: Planes of Fame Air Show 2026
events.description: Annual two-day airshow featuring WWII warbird flights, formation flying, and a rare aircraft static display. One of the top warbird events in the country.

events.title: Cable Airport Community Day
events.description: Free community open house at Cable Airport with aircraft static displays, flight school demos, and introductory discovery flights available for booking.
